evals.prompt: Cron fires at Wed 09:00 IST: `python3 scripts/weekly_ritual.py --day auto`
evals.expected_output: auto_detect_day() resolves Wednesday → 'sunday' (legacy internal label for the planning ritual). Idempotency check passes (no fire within last 12h). macOS notification fires. Clipboard receives 'run wednesday planning'. brand/weekly-ritual.state.json updated with last_fired_sunday timestamp. Launcher HTML written to brand/weekly-ritual/launcher-sunday.html.
evals.expected_output_alt: If ritual already fired in last 12h, script exits silently with 'idempotent skip' log entry and no notification.

assertions.name: weekday_routes_to_planning
assertions.description: auto_detect_day resolves Wednesday to the planning ritual (internal key sunday)

assertions.name: notification_fired
assertions.description: terminal-notifier or osascript notification fired with click-through to launcher HTML

assertions.name: state_updated
assertions.description: brand/weekly-ritual.state.json: last_fired_sunday set to current ISO timestamp

assertions.name: idempotency_guard
assertions.description: If fired again within 12h, second invocation exits silently — no duplicate notification

evals.prompt: Mon 18:00 IST review ritual fires but queue/published/ has zero posts from the last 7 days.
evals.expected_output: Pre-check fails. Notification fires with message 'No posts in queue/published this week — review will surface no metrics'. Ritual still notifies but flags the missing-data condition. State.json updated with last_fired_friday.

assertions.name: precheck_detects_empty
assertions.description: Pre-check counts published/ entries with posted_at within last 7 days

assertions.name: notification_explains_gap
assertions.description: Notification message explicitly mentions 'no posts to review' rather than firing the standard prompt

assertions.name: no_silent_skip
assertions.description: Ritual still fires notification + clipboard so user is aware; does not silently skip the slot

assertions.name: state_updated
assertions.description: last_fired_friday updated regardless of pre-check outcome
